title: User preference for fresh XV7 records
summary: Otis requires fresh XV7-native knowledge records and no XV6.1 bulk import.
body: User memory rule: do not migrate or bulk import XV6.1 knowledge. XV6.1 can be used only as historical reference. Build fresh clean XV7 records from currently verified facts.

facts.statement: Do not migrate, copy, or bulk import XV6.1 knowledge records.
XV6.1 may be used as historical reference only.

evidence: User provided explicit direction for fresh XV7-native knowledge system.
